non_retroactivity: No verdict value, endpoint, fired rule, or assessment verdict field changes. This record narrows LANGUAGE to measured scope. Where an assessment sentence and this erratum conflict, this erratum is the current reading; the underlying verdict objects are untouched and already consistent with the narrowed reading. Assessment records stay byte-identical as issued (append-never-edit per spec SS0 invariant 1), so sha256 pins of them elsewhere (e.g. registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json continuity block) remain valid.
